title: ShadowList - Uncensored Classifieds
content:

title: RAINN - National Sexual Assault Hotline
content:
# RAINN - National Sexual Assault Hotline

## Get Help Now
Call: 800-656-HOPE
Chat: Online confidential chat available 24/7

## What is Sexual Exploitation?
Sexual exploitation includes any non-consensual sexual activity, including distributing explicit content without consent, trafficking, and harassment.

## Signs of Exploitation
- Someone is being coerced into sexual activity
- Explicit content shared without consent
- Being directed to explicit content under false pretenses
- Online harassment or unwanted sexual advances

## Report Tips
If you suspect sexual exploitation, report it to the hotline or local law enforcement.
